theme_and_concept.rationale: A light theme conveys cleanliness, precision, and trust, aligning with high-end Swiss architectural and construction standards. We blend the 'Swiss & High-Contrast' archetype with subtle 'Organic' tones for a premium, solid feel.

typography.strategy: The 'Swiss Brutalist' approach: highly legible, modern geometric sans-serif for headings with high weight contrast (Light vs. Black), paired with a reliable geometric body font.

primary.description: Signal Red - evokes Swiss precision, draws immediate attention for CTAs (Offerte anfordern).

secondary.description: Deep Slate - used for heavy contrast sections, footers, and secondary buttons.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing (p-8 to p-24 for sections). Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-6 or p-8).

grids.marketing: Mode A: 'Tetris' Grid (gap-8 to gap-12, col-span mixing for asymmetry) for the Services and Portfolio sections.
grids.dashboard: Mode B: High Density Grid (gap-6, full-height widgets) for the Admin panel.

spacing_and_layout.alignment: Optical alignment over geometrical. Left-align dense content and forms. Hero content can be left-aligned for a modern, editorial look.

surfaces_and_materials.header: Crystal Glass: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 with a delicate 1px border-b border-slate-200. Must have z-50.
surfaces_and_materials.cards_marketing: Flat solid surfaces with subtle 1px border (border-slate-200) and no shadow by default. Hover adds shadow-lg and -translate-y-1.
surfaces_and_materials.dashboard_widgets: Neumorphic tactile variant: Flat background (white), 1px subtle border, sharp inner contrasts.
surfaces_and_materials.hero_overlay: bg-black/40 overlay to ensure text contrast while keeping the architectural image visible.

components.buttons: Sharp or slightly rounded corners (rounded-md), modern interaction animations (active:scale-95). Do not use pill-shape to maintain architectural rigidity.
components.forms_offertensystem: Shadcn components heavily customized to match the brand. Use Stepper/Tabs for multi-step. Clean, solid white cards for form steps. No generic inputs.
components.toast: Use 'sonner' for toast notifications (e.g., Quote submitted successfully).

motion_and_interactions.hover: Explicit hover states on all interactives (e.g., hover:bg-slate-900 hover:text-white).
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Specific transitions (transition-colors duration-200, transition-transform duration-300). DO NOT use 'transition: all'.
motion_and_interactions.page_load: Staggered fade-up for grid items and form steps.

images_and_media.strategy: High-quality, realistic construction and architectural photography. No abstract shapes for services.

hero.alt: Modern building facade featuring geometric glass panels

services.alt: Contemporary bathroom interior with tiled walls
Craftsman carefully measures wooden floor panels
Professional construction worker with power tool

team_trust.alt: Construction workers standing outdoors at building site

3d_and_visual_enhancers.strategy: Minimal 3D to keep it professional. Focus on high-end 2D photography and crisp typography.
3d_and_visual_enhancers.libraries: Framer Motion for scroll animations (fade in, parallax). Lucide React for crisp, consistent iconography.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text over images uses text-shadow or gradient overlays. Minimum 4.5:1 for standard text.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, steps) MUST include 'data-testid' (e.g., 'data-testid="offerte-submit-btn"').

universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., 'transition: all').
You MUST NOT center align the app container (.App { text-align: center; }).
Never use placeholder URLs (via.placeholder.com). Use the provided image URLs.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Avoid generic centered layouts; use 'Tetris' bento grids for marketing sections.
Use Lucide-react for all icons, keeping stroke-width consistent (typically 1.5).
Form inputs must have clear focus states (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:outline-none).
